The Indi^dnal Characteristics are symbolised by the position of THE Sun. The Sun is the source of the “vital force" m the Solar System, and Is specialised in the Sign through which its rays are passing month by month, this force or mdnence being again modified by the solar aspects, and, in a somewhat lesser degree by the other planetary positions also. Any Aspects to theSun (pars 202 to 225) should therefore be considered, jointly with its sign position, under this head, unless the Rising Sign happens to be Leo, m which case the solar aspects will already have received consideration m Section 1 under the beading of Aspects to the Ruler.
